unit.note: client suite; server unchanged (test-only e2e addition)

surface_verification.runner: playwright (chromium) vs isolated single-process Hono serving the built SPA + API (temp USERPROFILE, 127.0.0.1:3951)
surface_verification.justification: Real-browser regression guard for #200: the spec seeds a project + a task assigned to it, drives the ProjectsPage delete affordance + confirm dialog, and asserts the project row AND the synthesized 'Unassigned' row are both absent afterwards (pre-#200 the orphaned task synthesized a phantom row, so this assertion would fail), plus confirms via GET /api/external/tasks that the task is deleted (not re-homed). Ran green (1/1).

behaviors.behavior: Deleting a project that has a task leaves no phantom synthesized 'Unassigned' row and the task is gone (browser, end-to-end)
behaviors.evidence: client/e2e/flows/project-delete-cascade.spec.ts ran green (chromium, 1/1) against a real Hono stack — asserts project row + Unassigned row absent post-delete, confirm warns '1 task belonging...', task absent from GET /api/external/tasks
